You'll Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now? — React Basics: Hello React (2)
You'll Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now?

We've already taken a quick look at how React differs from Vue in terms of syntax. So now it's time to actually start getting to know React. In this post we'll set up a React environment with just a CDN, render our first "Hello React", and peek at how JSX and React.createElement relate under the hood.

CodePen is a great spot for frontend devs to put together quick demos — WYSIWYG online HTML/CSS/JS editor. This post is a quick intro for anyone who hasn't used it much — Pens vs. Projects vs. Collections, working with the editor, adding CDNs, preprocessors (Pug, Sass/SCSS/Less), formatting, Emmet customization, and the things that commonly trip people up (don't put `<body>` or `<head>` tags in your HTML pane).
